title: rosa mollis var. vayredae
intro: Rosa mollis var. vayredae is a type of fragrant, flowering shrub native to the Iberian Peninsula, known for its beautiful, pinkish-white flowers and delicate, velvety foliage. The medicinal properties of Rosa mollis var. vayredae include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and provide relief from stress and anxiety. The herbal preparations of Rosa mollis var. vayredae include infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used topically to soothe and calm the skin.
